executives.name: Cameron McKay
executives.background: Mr. McKay is a professional geologist with over 10 years of experience in uranium exploration. He has been involved in various stages of exploration from grassroots to resource definition in the Athabasca Basin.

executives.name: Charles Beaudry
executives.background: Mr. Beaudry is a professional geologist with more than 35 years of experience in mineral exploration and project development. He previously held senior roles with Noranda and Falconbridge.

executives.name: Stephen Stewart
executives.background: Mr. Stewart is the Chairman of the Orefinders Resources and Mistango River Resources. He has over 15 years of experience in the resource sector, focusing on corporate development and capital markets. He is also the founder of the Young Mining Professionals.
